title: glaucium corniculatum var. elegans
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. elegans, also known as the yellow horned poppy or elegant horned poppy, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a pain reliever and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of alkaloids such as protopine and sanguinarine. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum var. elegans include its potential to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its use in treating respiratory and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
